feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAD SD : Query of GST rate having differ for different unit price of material
entry.content: For materials with a unit price greater than Rs 1000, the GST rate should be 12%. However, for the same material, if the unit price is less than Rs 1000, the GST rate should be 5%. The HSN code remains the same for both cases. How can I configure this requirement in SAP

entry.title: Allocate products to Distribution channels by percentage not Quantity
entry.content:
Hello Dears, 
My client has a Pain point that when products are produced, representative comes first has edge to load quantity he wants with no considerations for another Reps . He needs to constrains this by SAP System but not by quantity he need it by percentage. He does not want product allocations as follows if for example he produces 1000 pcs daily 
Dist.Channel 1 : 500 PCS
Dist.Channel 2 : 300 PCS 
Dist.channel 3 : 200 PCS 

Production is not a fixed quantity daily , so he needs it to be for example: 
Dist.channel 1 : 50 % 
Dist.channel 2 : 30 % 
Dist.channel 3 : 20 % 

so does anything in SAP Standards fit this requirement ?

@

entry.title: Packing Issue due to missed stock posting in Inspection lot and QMHU table
entry.content:
Hi All,

Our client is setup HU managed warehouse (not EWM). Inspection lots are getting created at HU level. We are facing a weird issue on random basis.

At the time of Goods Receipt from external suppliers, Inspection lot gets generated at HU level and postings (321/311) happened on UD. QMHU table also updated properly.

But while doing goods receival process for STO, Inspection lot gets generated at HU level, but postings (321/311) does not happen on UD completion. And QMHU table is updating without stock posting (field: QMGBUCHHUM). When we try to use the same (batch) stock for goods issue with packing, system does not allow to complete packing and throws a dump  ( DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR ) where system tries to insert the duplicate entry into QMHU for specific inspection lot and new packing handling unit.

To sort this issue temporarily, we try to debug the dump and try to remove the duplicates from QMHU. which further allows to pack for goods issue.

If anyone has experienced the same issue and have the detailed information about root cause and resolution. Please share the same.

Thank you in advance !

entry.title: The invoice amount field in the revenue schedule not automatically reflecting the invoice values
entry.content:
The invoice amount field in the revenue schedule in Manage Revenue accounting application should automatically reflect the invoice values after the creation of the billing document, but this is not happening. 

In our scenario, after billing, the invoice is not reflecting in the invoice amount field in the revenue schedule, But If we manually process  Z_FARRIC_REPOST_ADVANCED from SE38 for both sales order and its related invoices, then we run the FARR_RAI_MON for both sales orders and invoices. The invoice amount column will update in the revenue schedule in the revenue accounting app.

We need to update the invoice amount field value automatically without running this manual process.

How to solve this issue?

entry.title: Subscriptions: Sales Order without Customer
entry.content:
Scenario: We sell products that include the option to activate a subscription license after the sale. There is no additional price for the subscription, it is "free" to the customer.

Requirement: From an accounting perspective, we will assign a revenue amount to the subscription. But, we are thinking we will need two sales orders: (1) for the original sale to the customer and (2) a second order for the activation of the license.  The second order will not be able to have the customer as there is no further charge; but, we think we need it at the time of activation to create the RAR item.

Can we have a Sales Order without a customer?  Is there some other option we should be considering?

SAP Revenue Accounting and Reporting

entry.title: Block sales order lines
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have a request from our customer. He would like the line(s) of the sales order to be blocked when the quantity is not full.
At the moment it doesn't block, so we need to go back to the orders to check and correct them if necessary.

Thanks for your help,

entry.title: Profit Center in sales order is not saved
entry.content:
Good morning,

In the material master, I have set the profit center. However, when I create a sales order with this material, the profit center is not filled.

In the sales order I get the message that the sales order is not complete and that the profit center is missing.

I can enter the profit center under Account Assignment on item level. I get no further error messages and then I get the message that the document is complete:

However, when I save it, the entry in profit center is deleted again, and I get the message that the document is incomplete:

What is happening here? Why can't I save the profit center in the sales order? I have created several other sales orders for this sales organization, where I used the same profit center and that caused no problems.

Kind regards,

Floyd

entry.title: Multiple tax calculation on a Single Line of Order/billing
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have a business situation that requests me to use handling and freight as condition types in the SD pricing procedure. We are adding freight and handling as condition type on the first line of the order/billing line item.

I also have a business requirement to calculate tax on freight and handling separately from the product price in line 1 of the order/billing.

As per standard SAP, only one tax code/call is allowed per line. How can I calculate different taxes on product vs Freight assuming both product price and freight charges are on line 1 of the order/billing?

Please note that we are using Vertex for tax calculation.

Thanks

Avnish

entry.title: Duplicate spool is getting generated in MIGO for Mtyp 311.
entry.content:
Hello Friends

When i am trying to do transfer posting in MIGO, movement type 311 for custom Output , duplicate spools are getting generated which is causing paper wastage.

Replication steps.Step 1. Run the tcode MIGO
Step 2. Choose A08 Transfer posting, R10 Other
Step 3. Enter material <XXXXXXXXXX>, Plant XXXX, Issuing Storage location XXXX, Destination storage location XXXX and Quantity 1.
Step 4. Click on Post.

Did debugging there is no code to generate duplicate spools.

And even choosing Individual slip while posting.

 

Regards

Naeeum

entry.title: Overlapping fields in the pop-up associated with the occasional customer when creating a sales order
entry.content:
Hi

I'm having a problem with the occasional customer, i.e. when I put the sold-to party “sporadic” in the sales order, when I open the pop-up to change the data associated with the customer at the time of the sale, overlapping fields appear, in particular the field relating to the tax number.

 

As you can see in the image, the other attributes tab and its fields appear overlapping, making it impossible to fill in those fields.

I don't know if this error has to do with the system version, as it's S/4HANA, version 102.

Has anyone had this problem?

Thanks

entry.title: Invoice cannot release accounting document.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

Invoice (type ZXX1) cannot be released to accounting because of pricing error. There is no price for a line item, which explains the error. However, there is another billing type (ZXX2) with similar settings. But for this second billing type, even though there is no price for the same material/ item category, the invoice can be released to accounting.

Hence, would anyone be able to suggest which config controls this behavior. Looking for your inputs.

 

 

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Business objects BUS2032
entry.content: Hi all, I want to know what business objects are, its use in SAP and significance. I know BUS2032 is object for sales order, but does it have any configurations relevant for consultants? Any more additional information will be appreciated.

entry.title: Asttx field not updateing in va42
entry.content:
I have an issue .. As for tcode va42. , user status field rv45-asttx field is showing status of create . Even though I changed it to release and saved , after revisiting same document its shows create status..

How can i proceed for this problem

entry.title: How can I add filter conditions when I "search and select" the materials?
entry.content:
Hello, expert,

System: s/4hana public cloud
Transaction: create sales order VA01

In the item part, how can I add filter conditions when I "search and select" the materials? eg: add the condition "Marked for deletion" (as shown in red in the picture.) Thanks!

BR, 

Wendy

entry.title: Batch number not getting copied in Return order
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I hope you're doing well.

I'm facing an issue with copying the batch number into a return order when I create it with reference to an invoice. My issue is that I'm billing only the main item, while the batch numbers in the delivery are in sub-items. Is there any way to keep my current configuration and still get the batch number in the return order?

entry.title: How to check change log for condition contract
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

Greetings, 

I have a bsuiness case , where the customer and materials are being added in the condition contract in change mode in WCOCO_CHANGE ,when i was tried to find change log , the system is only showing the Object values and table key but not actuall which  i or business mainatined in change mode of CC #.

Ask : Is there a way to check what has been mainatined or modified in condition contract .

The change log showing the document number , that docunet number is also not showing the complete details in CDHDR/ CDPOS Table.

So, pleae guide me

Many thanks !

entry.title: DO NOT ALLOW CHANGE CONTRACT START DATE IN VA42:
entry.content:
Hello:

I have a question about avoid edition in fields, in VA42 transaction.

I want avoid to change Contract Start Date, if my SD document is not
in a defined status.

I think, i need to review it in userexit_field_modification, but when in SCREEN-NAME variable
check the field (VEDA-VBEGDAT) , never i have this value.

Do you know how could change edition of this field?

Thanks!!

Carlos.

entry.title: Sales Pricing analysis Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello All,

I would like to understand if there is a similar Pricing analysis functionality available in any of the Sales Fiori apps.  Does anyone have any idea or know how to achieve similar functionality in Fiori? Thank you in advance.

 

   

BR, Sampath

entry.title: Error during delivery
entry.content:
Hii

Guru

I created sales order 1050 with reference to inquiry but during delivery i am getting error copy control is missing for AF TAN

entry.title: Intercompany purchase for materials with account assignment or Lean services
entry.content:
Hi All

I'm in a greenfield implementation for S4Hana Cloud private.

In this project is required to implement an intercompany process starting in the purchase order but for materials with account assignment or Lean services (this is not possible in advanced intercompany).

For Cloud public edition this scenario exist: Scenario Billing of Costs Between Affiliated Companies (3ZB) but i can't find similar guide for Cloud private.

Can anyone share any implementation guide or documentation about this process?
